title: D2 telemetry spec
description: Schema for contracts/telemetry/telemetry.spec.json — the source-of-truth catalog of meters / instruments / closed-enum tag values that DcsvIo.D2.Telemetry.Tags.SourceGen reads to emit *TelemetryTags.g.cs typed-constants files into the meters' consuming assemblies.

meter.description: OTel meter name (matches the runtime Meter ctor + the METER_NAME const). Must be unique across the spec.

consumingAssembly.description: The .NET assembly name whose *TelemetryTags.g.cs file is emitted to. Single-target dispatch by the SrcGen - only the named assembly receives this meter's emission. Meters with no closed-enum tags receive no emitted file (spec entry is documentation-only).

tagsNamespace.description: Optional override for the namespace of the emitted *TelemetryTags class. Defaults to the consumingAssembly + .Telemetry.

tagsClassName.description: Optional override for the emitted typed-constants class name. Defaults to a derived name (meter's last segment + 'TelemetryTags', e.g. AuthTelemetryTags).

deprecated.description: When true, the entry is deprecated: the generated C# constant + factory carry [Obsolete] and the TS constant + factory carry @deprecated. Additive — the entry is NEVER deleted. Deleting a deprecated (or non-deprecated) entry is a breaking change the JSON-diff gate fails.

deprecatedReason.description: Plain dev-facing English explaining why the code is deprecated; rendered into the [Obsolete("...")] message, the @deprecated JSDoc, and the changelog entry. NOT a TK key (developer-facing, not user-facing).

replacedBy.description: Wire code of the successor entry (e.g. RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND). Must reference a real, non-deprecated entry in the merged registry. Omit for pure retirement with no replacement.

sunset.description: ISO-8601 date for the future RFC 8594 Sunset response header. Edge-runtime-deferred: carried on the contract now, consumed by the Edge response middleware when it exists. Inert until then.

name.description: Wire-format instrument name (dot-separated). Must be unique within the meter.

constName.description: Optional PascalCase override for the typed-constants nested-class name (e.g. JwtValidations). Defaults to the last dot-segment of name PascalCased.

kind.description: Instrument kind. Drives factory selection in code (CreateCounter / CreateHistogram / CreateGauge).

description.description: Description string passed to the Meter.CreateXxx call.

tags.description: Optional tag specifications. Untagged instruments omit this field. An instrument with closed-enum tags drives codegen of a typed-constants nested class; instruments without tags are documentation-only.

deprecated.description: When true, the entry is deprecated: the generated C# constant + factory carry [Obsolete] and the TS constant + factory carry @deprecated. Additive — the entry is NEVER deleted. Deleting a deprecated (or non-deprecated) entry is a breaking change the JSON-diff gate fails.

deprecatedReason.description: Plain dev-facing English explaining why the code is deprecated; rendered into the [Obsolete("...")] message, the @deprecated JSDoc, and the changelog entry. NOT a TK key (developer-facing, not user-facing).

replacedBy.description: Wire code of the successor entry (e.g. RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND). Must reference a real, non-deprecated entry in the merged registry. Omit for pure retirement with no replacement.

sunset.description: ISO-8601 date for the future RFC 8594 Sunset response header. Edge-runtime-deferred: carried on the contract now, consumed by the Edge response middleware when it exists. Inert until then.

name.description: Wire-format tag name (snake_case). Emitted as the TAG_<UPPER> constant on the typed-constants class.

values.description: Closed-enum tag value set (snake_case). Mutually exclusive with valuesFromSpec.

valuesFromSpec.description: Cross-spec reference. When set, the tag's value set is resolved at codegen time from another spec (currently only 'auth-error-codes' is supported - resolves to the AuthErrorCodes spec's code field). Mutually exclusive with values.

deprecated.description: When true, the entry is deprecated: the generated C# constant + factory carry [Obsolete] and the TS constant + factory carry @deprecated. Additive — the entry is NEVER deleted. Deleting a deprecated (or non-deprecated) entry is a breaking change the JSON-diff gate fails.

deprecatedReason.description: Plain dev-facing English explaining why the code is deprecated; rendered into the [Obsolete("...")] message, the @deprecated JSDoc, and the changelog entry. NOT a TK key (developer-facing, not user-facing).

replacedBy.description: Wire code of the successor entry (e.g. RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND). Must reference a real, non-deprecated entry in the merged registry. Omit for pure retirement with no replacement.

sunset.description: ISO-8601 date for the future RFC 8594 Sunset response header. Edge-runtime-deferred: carried on the contract now, consumed by the Edge response middleware when it exists. Inert until then.
